arts.sum: Chelsea and Legia Warsaw announce their first XIs for the second leg of their Conference League quarter-final at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Legia Warsaw line-ups: Palmer among players starting for Blues
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has named a strong side despite his side being 3-0 up from the first leg and firmly on course for the Conference League semi-final. Cole Palmer is among those in the line-up, as is Nicolas Jackson. Young defender Josh Acheampong, who impressed in the first leg, is again starting. arts.ttl: Jamie Gittens to Chelsea: Maresca handed €50m discount as 'DREAM' transfer edges closer
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have reportedly lowered their asking price for Jamie Gittens to just €50 million amid significant interest from Chelsea . The England U21 international has enjoyed a breakout campaign at the Signal Iduna Park, registering 17 goal contributions in all competitions, but he has only started one of Dortmund’s last seven Bundesliga matches after falling out of favour under new head coach Niko Kovac.

arts.ttl: ‘Chelsea in the lead’ – Blues out in front for Champions League star, and could get discount too
arts.sum: Chelsea are currently leading the race for Borussia Dortmund striker Serhou Guirassy and could get him for less than his €70m release clause too. That’s according to Calciomercato.it, who follow up a report from earlier today about Chelsea’s interest and insist they’re very much out in front at this moment in time. arts.ttl: Chelsea add two players to Enzo Maresca's squad and three debut vs Legia Warsaw in huge changes
arts.sum: After back-to-back draws against Brentford and Ipswich Town - two of the three most winnable games between now and the end of the season, possibly only with the visit of the worst Manchester United side in Premier League history still to come, and even then Chelsea have a poor record in the fixture of late - there is real pressure on. So Maresca can be excused for looking beyond Thursday night's Conference League quarter-final second leg.
